description: Security descriptor for Expense Tracker application

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Admin role with full access to Budget and Transactions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.User
scopes.description: User role with transaction access only

role-templates.name: Admin
role-templates.description: Administrator with full access to Budget and Transactions

role-templates.name: User
role-templates.description: User with access to Transactions only
